---
title: "Assignments"
---

Three homework assignments, each worth 25% of the course grade. Submit electronic copies via Canvas.

| # | Topic | Released | Due | Materials |
|---|-------|----------|-----|-----------|
| 1 | Regression and regularization | TBD | TBD | [HW 1](hw1.qmd) |
| 2 | Classification | TBD | TBD | [HW 2](hw2.qmd) |
| 3 | Clustering and dimensionality reduction | TBD | TBD | [HW 3](hw3.qmd) |

## Submission and grading

- Submissions go through Canvas as a knitted PDF (and optionally the `.Rmd` source).
- Solutions are graded on **both correctness and clarity** — use whitespace, write clear comments, and label your output.
- Partial credit is given for identifying gaps in an argument when a complete solution cannot be derived.

## Late policy

| Days late | Credit |
|-----------|-------:|
| 0–1       | 80%    |
| 1–2       | 50%    |
| > 2       | 0%     |

Exceptions for sickness or emergency require the instructor be informed in advance.

## Collaboration

Discussion among students is allowed and encouraged. Each student must independently write and implement their own solution. Cite any external sources you consulted.
